title: Lesson 52
paragraph: This lesson practices useful adjectives for feelings.

words.example: I am glad to see you.

words.meaning: happy because of something good you did
words.example: She is proud of her drawing.

words.meaning: feeling bad because you did something wrong
words.japaneseMeaning: 恥ずかしい／恥じている
words.example: He is ashamed of his lie.

words.meaning: feeling shy or uncomfortable because people notice you
words.japaneseMeaning: 恥ずかしい／きまり悪い
words.example: I feel embarrassed when I make a mistake.

words.meaning: sure that you can do something
words.example: She is confident before the speech.
I am nervous before the test.
Try to stay calm during the exam.
She is upset about the broken cup.
My teacher is pleased with my work.

words.meaning: sad because something was not good
words.example: I am disappointed with my low score.
